HighlyAvailableVirtualIpBindingInstance.haVipId: The ID of the highly available virtual IP
HighlyAvailableVirtualIpBindingInstance.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
HighlyAvailableVirtualIpBindingInstance.instanceIds: List of bound instance IDs, with a maximum list length of 5
HighlyAvailableVirtualIpBindingInstance.instanceType: Type of the bound instance. "SERVER" indicates a cloud server (BCC/BBC/DCC); "ENI" indicates an elastic network interface
